title: The Weird Man
description: I Challenged Myself To Make A Horror Mod In One Hour!
body:
This horror mod adds a monster called "weird man" that tries to kill you and stalks you and if you kill him you get his head, and it's a powerful weapon this horror mod adds a new biome too for you to explore and enjoy! Also, this mod was made in one hour in a challenge I decided to do!
